title: otiophora lebruniana var. devrediana
intro: Otiophora lebruniana var. devrediana, also known as the West African Otiophora, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Otiophora lebruniana var. devrediana include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste for topical application, with some herbal preparations also involving the use of the plant's leaves in combination with other medicinal herbs.
